prompt: Keep the woman EXACTLY as she is in the photo — her face, hair, skin tone, body, pose, hands, and especially her fine NAVY-AND-WHITE PINSTRIPE cotton midi dress — completely unchanged. Do NOT repaint, restyle, or alter her face or identity; treat her as a locked, untouched layer. Keep her feet and the ground fully visible, resting naturally on pale stone paving. Replace ONLY the background. A plain bright white Cycladic plaster wall with gentle texture and generous clean negative space — NO window, NO shutter, NO door behind her, just the calm white wall. A small sprig of lavender low to one side at the base of the wall. Soft warm Mediterranean daylight matching the existing light on her. Soft realistic contact shadow grounding her. Photographic, editorial, medium-format film look, fine grain, muted natural color, calm slow-fashion mood — a real photograph, never illustration or CGI. Vertical 2:3.
